name_en: Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. It is a two-piece set featuring a curved Pea Bag, a crossbody bag, and a shoulder bag. A small coin purse can also serve as an extra pocket. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!
name_cn:
Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!
Size: 21 X 7 X 5
